title: Emmanuel Katto Dubai : Is there a method to ensure that projects and dependencies do not account for weekends?
excerpt: Hi team! I’m looking for a method to ensure that projects and dependencies do not account for weekends in our scheduling. If anyone has experience with this or can recommend a solution, I’d love to hear your suggestions! …

posts.author: emmanuelkatto24 (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team! I’m looking for a method to ensure that projects and dependencies do not account for weekends in our scheduling. If anyone has experience with this or can recommend a solution, I’d love to hear your suggestions!

Regards
Emmanuel Katto
